home.title: ecom-ruq
home.tagline: Phase 0 scaffold is alive. Bilingual routing, tenant resolution, and real content land in the next chunks.

auth.signUpHint: Use at least 10 characters. We'll email you a verification link.
auth.magicLinkTitle: Or get a one-time sign-in link
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for a sign-in link.
auth.magicLinkFailed: Could not send the link. Try again in a minute.
auth.verifyPendingBody: We've sent a verification link. Click it to activate your account.
auth.errorInvalid: That didn't work. Check your details and try again.
auth.errorBreached: That password has been seen in a breach. Please choose a different one.
auth.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
auth.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.errorUnverified: Please verify your email before signing in.

create.title: New product
create.slugHelper: Lowercase Latin letters, numbers, and hyphens. Appears in the product URL.

slugError.too_long: Slug must be 120 characters or fewer.
slugError.invalid_chars: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
slugError.leading_hyphen: Slug cannot start with a hyphen.
slugError.trailing_hyphen: Slug cannot end with a hyphen.
slugError.consecutive_hyphens: Slug cannot contain two hyphens in a row.

create.forbidden: You don't have permission to create products.
create.error: Could not create the product. Please check your inputs.
create.validationTooLong: Too long — try a shorter value.

list.title: Products

empty.heading: No products yet
empty.body: Your first product is one click away.

list.error: Could not load products. Try again in a moment.

restoreDialog.heading: Restore {name}?
restoreDialog.body: It will be visible again on the storefront and the default product list.

restoreError.windowExpired: This product can no longer be restored. The 30-day window has passed.

edit.title: Edit product
edit.costPriceHelper: Optional. Visible only to the owner. Used for margin calculations.
edit.slugChangeWarning: Changing the URL may break links to this product.
edit.staleWriteError: This product was changed by someone else. Refresh to see the latest version.
edit.dirtyConfirmBody: You have unsaved edits. They will be lost if you leave this page.
edit.loadError: Could not load this product. Try again in a moment.
edit.forbidden: You don't have permission to edit products.
edit.error: Could not save your changes. Please check your inputs.
edit.slugTaken: That slug is already used by another product.

removeDialog.heading: Remove {name}?
removeDialog.body: This product will be hidden from the storefront and the default product list. You have 30 days to restore it. After 30 days it will be permanently deleted.

categories.heading: Categories
categories.noneSelected: No categories yet. Tap Add to choose some.
categories.staleError: One or more selected categories are no longer available. Please review your selections.

options.heading: Options
options.helperEmpty: Add up to 3 option types to create variants. Skip if this product comes in only one version.
options.capReachedHelp: Maximum 3 option types per product. Combine into one option (e.g. "Colour & Size").
options.removeOptionDisabledHelp: Remove will be available once you can review which variants it affects.
options.validationRequired: Both English and Arabic are required.

variants.skuTaken: This SKU is already used by another variant.
variants.duplicateCombination: This combination is already used by another variant.
variants.saveError: Could not save variants. Please check your inputs.

categoryPicker.searchResultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No matches} one {# match} other {# matches}}
categoryPicker.selectedCount: {count, plural, =0 {None selected} one {# selected} other {# selected}}
categoryPicker.emptyHelper: Create one first. The new tab keeps your edits safe.
categoryPicker.disabledSelfOrDescendant: Cannot select itself or its descendants.

list.title: Categories

restoreDialog.heading: Restore {name}?
restoreDialog.body: It will be visible again to staff and reappear in category pickers. Products that were linked to it before removal will be visible under it again.

restoreError.windowExpired: This category can no longer be restored. The 30-day window has passed.
restoreError.parentStillRemoved: The parent category is still removed. Restore the parent first, then restore this one.
restoreError.slugTaken: Another category took this address while this one was removed. Open this category to choose a different address.
restoreError.depthExceeded: Restoring this would exceed the 3-level limit. The category tree changed while it was removed.

empty.heading: No categories yet
empty.body: Group your products into categories so shoppers can find them.

list.error: Could not load categories. Try again in a moment.

create.title: New category
create.slugHelper: Lowercase Latin letters, numbers, and hyphens. Shared across both languages — Arabic categories use the same Latin URL.

slugError.too_long: Slug must be 120 characters or fewer.
slugError.invalid_chars: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
slugError.leading_hyphen: Slug cannot start with a hyphen.
slugError.trailing_hyphen: Slug cannot end with a hyphen.
slugError.consecutive_hyphens: Slug cannot contain two hyphens in a row.

create.parentHelper: Pick a parent to nest this category under, or leave it as a top-level category.
create.forbidden: You don't have permission to create categories.
create.error: Could not create the category. Please check your inputs.
create.slugTaken: That slug is already used by another category.
create.parentNotFound: The parent you chose is no longer available. Pick another parent.
create.depthExceeded: This parent already has three levels under it. Pick a shallower parent.

edit.title: Edit category
edit.slugChangeWarning: Changing the URL may break links to this category.
edit.staleWriteError: This category was changed by someone else. Refresh to see the latest version.
edit.dirtyConfirmBody: You have unsaved edits. They will be lost if you leave this page.
edit.loadError: Could not load this category. Try again in a moment.
edit.forbidden: You don't have permission to edit categories.
edit.error: Could not save your changes. Please check your inputs.
edit.slugTaken: That slug is already used by another category.
edit.parentNotFound: The parent you chose is no longer available. Pick another parent.
edit.depthExceeded: Moving this category here would exceed the 3-level limit.
edit.categoryCycle: A category cannot be its own ancestor.

removeDialog.heading: Remove {name}?
removeDialog.body: This category will be hidden from the storefront and from category pickers. You have 30 days to restore it. After 30 days it will be permanently deleted.
removeDialog.cascadeWarning: {count, plural, one {This will also remove # sub-category beneath it.} other {This will also remove # sub-categories beneath it.}}
removeDialog.productsNote: Any products linked to these categories will lose those tags until the categories are restored.

tokens.title: Access tokens
tokens.subtitle: Personal access tokens authenticate Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and other MCP clients.
tokens.ownerOnlyNotice: Access tokens are managed by the owner. Staff cannot view or mint tokens.

create.heading: New access token
create.nameHelper: A short label so you can tell your tokens apart later.
create.scopeRoleHelper: Owner can manage everything. Staff can run day-to-day admin. Support is read-only.
create.ownerScopeConfirmLabel: Yes, mint a token with full owner access.
create.ownerScopeConfirmHelper: Owner-scoped tokens can create and revoke other tokens. Keep this token somewhere safe.
create.experimentalDescription: These grants expose non-core tools. Leave unchecked unless you know why you need them.
create.experimentalToolsConfirmHelper: A token with experimental tool access can reach internals most tokens cannot. Grant only when needed.
create.errorValidation: Please check the form — some fields need attention.
create.errorForbidden: You don't have permission to create tokens.
create.errorRateLimited: Too many tokens minted recently. Try again in a few minutes.
create.errorGeneric: Could not create the token. Please try again.

reveal.heading: Your new token
reveal.body: This is the only time you'll see this value. Copy it somewhere safe before closing this panel.
reveal.copyBlocked: Copy blocked — select and copy manually.

revoke.dialogBody: Revoking "{name}" will immediately disconnect any tool or agent using it. This cannot be undone.
revoke.errorGeneric: Could not revoke the token. Please try again.
